Purpose: Unique identifier for each zone
Human-readable name for the zone (e.g. "Entrance Floor 1")
Identifier linking zone to physical camera
Normalized polygon vertices for Roboflow PolygonZone; stores array of [x y] pairs
Floor level identifier (e.g. "L1" "L2" "B1")
Categorical type: entrance entrance queue checkout corridor intrusion_detection etc.
Flag indicating if ReID tracking is active in this zone
Unique identifier for each detection frame event
UTC timestamp of frame capture
Sequential frame count from video stream
Source camera identifier
Zone where detection occurred; null if outside all zones
Specific polygon zone for spatial filtering (distinct from zone_id)
Model used for detection (e.g. "PeopleNet_ONNX")
Detected class label (e.g. "person")
Model confidence score 0.0-1.0
JSON object: {"x": float "y": float "width": float "height": float} in normalized coordinates
Intra-video tracking ID from ByteTrack or similar; resets per video segment
ReID method identifier (e.g. "OSNet" "None")
Cross-video ReID identity; matches reid_features.reid_id if confident match found
Previous zone for movement analysis; tracks zone transitions
Discrete movement classification: IN, OUT, or DWELL

Directional confirmation once object has moved in said direction, set at the zone definition (for example, in_direction is left to right, so once the object has moved left to right, the direction is right or IN the store)
Direction in reference to the bounding box, is the object moving down, up, left, or right
Seconds spent in current zone; null if movement_type is not dwell
Aggregate count of unique persons in zone at timestamp
Inference + database write latency in milliseconds; SLA tracking
Links emotion classification to parent detection event
Classified emotion label (e.g. "happy" "angry" "neutral" "sad" "fearful" "surprised" "disgusted")
DeepFace emotion confidence score 0.0-1.0
Face bounding box in normalized coordinates; may differ from detection_events.bbox if face is partial
Unique identifier for each alert rule
Human-readable rule name (e.g. "Intrusion After Hours" "High Dwell Time")
Zone where rule is enforced; null if rule applies globally
Logic descriptor (e.g. "dwell_time > threshold_max AND object_class = person")
Lower bound for trigger (e.g. minimum crowd count or dwell time)
Upper bound for trigger (e.g. maximum allowed dwell time)
Alert severity level: INFO WARNING CRITICAL
Rule category (e.g. "intrusion_detection" "crowd_analysis" "dwell_time" "emotion" "planogram")
Enable/disable rule without deletion
Unique identifier for each alert
UTC timestamp when alert was triggered
Rule that triggered this notification
Detection event that caused alert; may be null for aggregate rules
Zone where alert occurred
Camera that triggered alert
Actual metric value at time of trigger (e.g. {"dwell_time": 45.2 "threshold_max": 40})
Human-readable alert message for dashboard/dashboard display
Cross-video identity identifier; composite of hash fragments or UUID to ensure uniqueness
OSNet embedding (512-dim float array) serialized as JSON; used for cosine similarity matching
Most recent timestamp this identity was observed
Last zone where this identity was detected
Last camera that observed this identity
State tracking: active (recently seen) inactive (not seen > threshold) archived (historical)
